arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Qarabag – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur begin their European campaign with a home clash against Azerbaijan’s Qarabag in the Europa League on Thursday. The North Londoners return to continental competition after a one-season absence and Ange Postecoglou – who has insisted he always win silverware in his second season – will be targeting this competition for success. After a […] The post Tottenham vs Qarabag – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has told Ange Postecoglou and Tottenham his Man City plan after Carabao Cup draw
arts.sum: What could play into Tottenham's hands in next month's fourth round tie is that Guardiola has already made his stance for the competition clear following City's 2-1 win over Watford on Tuesday evening. Already facing a packed schedule even before you take into consideration that they had to play their Carabao Cup tie with Watford just 49 hours after their draw with Arsenal, Guardiola has revealed that he will be using the competition to rest his senior players.

arts.ttl: Huge admirers: Chelsea rival Spurs for versatile attacker transfer, Maresca also wanted him at Leicester
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly showing an interest in the potential transfer of Bayer Leverkusen wonderkid Francis Onyeka, whom Enzo Maresca is a big fan of and has been tracking since his time in charge at Leicester City. The Blues are now among the clubs scouting Onyeka, along with London rivals Tottenham, according to Football Transfers, with […] The post Huge admirers: Chelsea rival Spurs for versatile attacker transfer, Maresca also wanted him at Leicester appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: £6.75m player scores his fifth goal in three games just months after Spurs let him go
arts.sum: Troy Parrott has been in fine form for AZ Alkmaar and extended his tally to five goals in his last three games with the winner on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Man City verdict expected today as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham set for Premier League meeting
arts.sum: Premier League clubs, including Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham are braced for an update this Thursday on Manchester City's challenge to the league's Associated Party Transactions (APTs) rules. In a separate case involving the Premier League, an independent hearing is currently underway concerning Man City's 130 charges for allegedly violating the league's financial rules.

arts.ttl: Man United considering shock move for midfielder who left Tottenham in 2023
arts.sum: Manchester United have been one of the busiest Premier League teams recently in adding new players to their squad. They spent heavily in the summer transfer window, backed by new co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe and lead by the new hierarchy at the club. arts.ttl: Tottenham urged to replace veteran player in January
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou won’t be too happy with Tottenham’s start to their 2024/25 campaign, even if there have been a couple of plus points to highlight. The Australian is rightly demanding of his playing staff, and if the Lilywhites want to put an end to their 16 year trophy drought, then everyone in the squad has […] The post Tottenham urged to replace veteran player in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why do we wear all white on European nights? The story behind a Spurs tradition...
arts.sum: The players will be back in the all-white kit that has been synonymous with Tottenham Hotspur playing in European competition since our first foray into Europe in the European Cup as English champions in 1961. Under the guidance of legendary manager Bill Nicholson, the colours of lilywhite and blue became synonymous not just with success but with success achieved in the right way – in style.
